summary: Iteration 75 - Frontend testing of 'Faire le point' (Reversement) signature/closure flow. BUG NOT REPRODUCED - The signature flow is working correctly. Complete end-to-end flow tested: save point → fill billettage → apply billettage → save → sign → admin validate. All steps passed successfully.

issues: React hydration warnings: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' - This is a React internal warning from the preview environment that doesn't affect functionality

React hydration warning: '
cannot be a descendant of

' in Badge component - Minor HTML nesting issue, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: PointFinancierTab.jsx: The signature flow is working correctly
Line 165-167: cashMatches uses strict equality (billettageTotal === parseFloat(form.cash_amount)) - This works correctly when billettage is saved
Line 169-193: handleSignClick() correctly validates billettage before opening consent modal
Line 118-121: applyBillettage() correctly updates form.cash_amount with billettageTotal
Line 123-146: savePoint() correctly persists billettage to backend
Line 148-158: signPoint() correctly calls API to sign the point
IMPORTANT: User must click 'Mettre à jour' (save) after filling billettage before sign button becomes active - this is expected behavior but may confuse users
seed_data_creation: Created test financial point for week 27/04/2026 - 03/05/2026 with cash_amount=10000, mobile_amount=5000, billettage={10000: 1}
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 75 tested the 'Faire le point' > 'Reversement' signature flow. The bug reported by user ('Faire le point ne marche pas correctement - signature/clôture ne fonctionne pas') was NOT reproduced. The flow works correctly when following the proper sequence: 1) Fill amounts, 2) Click 'Enregistrer', 3) Open billettage, 4) Fill billettage, 5) Click 'Appliquer aux Espèces', 6) Click 'Mettre à jour' to save, 7) Click 'Signer (Gérante)', 8) Check consent and click 'Je signe'. Key data-testids: fp-save-btn, fp-sign-btn, fp-toggle-billettage, fp-bill-10000, fp-apply-billettage, fp-consent-checkbox, fp-confirm-sign-btn, fp-admin-validate-btn.

bug_reproduction_result.reported_bug: Faire le point ne marche pas correctement - signature/clôture ne fonctionne pas
bug_reproduction_result.conclusion: The signature/closure flow is working correctly. The user may have been confused by the workflow requirement to save billettage before signing. Recommend asking user for more specific reproduction steps or screenshots of the error they encountered.

potential_user_confusion_points: User must click 'Mettre à jour' after filling billettage before sign button becomes active
Button text changes from 'Compléter le billetage' (amber) to 'Signer (Gérante)' (green) only after billettage is saved
If user modifies amounts after saving, they need to save again before signing
